ikea-kvartett.title: IKEA Kvartett
ikea-kvartett.subtitle: Brand, information architecture, and tactile interaction
ikea-kvartett.description: In an era of digital overload, I designed this analog quartet game to explore information architecture. By moving discovery off the screen and into the hands of the shopper, this game turns a quick shopping trip into a meaningful, shared journey.
ikea-kvartett.challenge: How to design an analog extension of the IKEA store experience that encourages visitors to pause, connect, and explore the catalog in a calm, intentional way.
ikea-kvartett.process: A classic Quartet game that aligns with IKEA’s core value of 'togetherness.'

wie-gaat-eerst.title: Wie Gaat Eerst? (Who goes first?)
wie-gaat-eerst.subtitle: Building nurse resilience through instinctive triage simulations.
wie-gaat-eerst.description: Wie gaat eerst? is a digital design intervention inspired by simulation games...
wie-gaat-eerst.challenge: How to make nursing students more resilient against cognitive overload?
wie-gaat-eerst.process: Focusing on building human resilience through cognitive schemas.
wie-gaat-eerst.results: We developed a digital design intervention built upon the cognitive load framework.

vistar-media.title: Vistar Media
vistar-media.subtitle: Digital signage and programmatic advertising strategy.
vistar-media.description: Detailed description of the Vistar Media project goes here.
vistar-media.challenge: How to optimize digital out-of-home advertising interfaces?
vistar-media.process: Strategic mapping and visual identity design.
vistar-media.results: Improved engagement metrics and streamlined user workflows.
